Lyric YEONJUN (TXT) - Do It

Romanization

I could teach you how to do it yeah, step by step
bokjaphal geot eopseo right left right left
Do a spin, do a spin doeji ma nokdaun
nacheoreom keep movin’ till you throw it down

nae umjigim got you got you addicted
Just dance kkwalla doen deusi no worries no sukchwi
nae eokkaereul bwa talgoldwaetjana shake it
mureobwa how I do it jeonnal sulcheoreom baeeo itji

Speed it up, speed it up, slow it down
hetgallyeodo jodan deusi norana like mildang
Speed it up, speed it up, slow it down
jeokdanghineun honna don’t kill my vibe

Baby, don’t get comfortable
matgyeo eumage mom, heulligo danyeo meot
All the girls nawa hamkke umjigyeo mom
Boy you neodo nawa chumchwo japji ma pom

Do it (Do it)

isi.lyrics:
Lyric YEONJUN (TXT) - Let Me Tell You (feat. Daniela of KATSEYE)

Romanization

Let me tell you, tell you
About you and me

Girl, ne apeseon maeumi rushin’
meomchul su eopseo igeon somethin’ real
Need you right now, got no patience
Right now, right now

nunggireun neoreul chase
meorineun ojik neoui face
I wanna be your baby

neukkil su itge all day
Gonna love you in every way
I wanna be your baby

When we’re touchin’ (Me gustas así)
Huggin’ (Dale, ponte así)
Slow lovin’ (Te quiero pa’ mí)
ppajyeo daeullae deo gipi

Into your ocean (Me gustas así)
In motion (Dale, ponte así)
urin flowin’ (Solo para mí)
geureoge just you and me

Don’t look away
Oh, you don’t have to think daeche mwol hesitate
geujeo neon matgimyeon dwae your waist on me
ipsureul tte neol gajil su itge
eopseo naegen naeil

We got no time to waste
ijeneun malhae jullae
I wanna be your baby

ppaenoji anko all day
Gonna love you in every way

Lyric YEONJUN (TXT) - Forever

Romanization

I try
Not thinkin’ too much
Not movin’ too fast
’Cause life will pass you by
Real quick
Watch this

I’mma throw a fit if I keep watchin’ this watch tick
Keep your eyes on the prize, don’t sit
Don’t snooze
You got
Too much to lose, then it feels like

I try
Not thinkin’ too much
Not movin’ too fast
’Cause life will pass you by
Real quick
Watch this (I’mma throw)

Close my eyes
I don’t know if I’d rather be dreaming, dreaming
Or be with you
’Cause I know that one day we’ll be leaving, be leaving

So like forever ain’t forever ain’t enough
And time is runnin’, you know better than to rush
Like forever ain’t forever ain’t enough
Tried to tell you I’m not ready yet to go

Strawberry day
Red like the sun rays
I love the taste
Could lay here all day

So maybe
